product_overview: AI Code Reviewer for LMS is a role-based web app that lets students upload HTML/CSS projects for automated AI evaluation and review, while teachers manage classrooms and monitor student progress. The product also provides dashboards, submission history, and detailed feedback on project quality.
core_goals: Create student and teacher accounts with role-based access
Allow students to upload HTML/CSS project folders for evaluation
Show AI-generated results and detailed feedback for submitted projects
Let students review their submission history and past performance
Let teachers view classroom and student progress from a dashboard

features.name: Authentication
features.description: Users can register or log in as either a student or a teacher to access the appropriate dashboard.
user_flows: Navigate to /register -> Choose a student or teacher role -> Enter email, password, and full name -> Submit registration form -> See the role-based dashboard
Navigate to /login -> Enter email and password -> Submit login form -> See the role-based dashboard
Navigate to /login -> Choose to register -> Go to /register -> Choose a role -> Enter account details -> Submit registration form -> See the role-based dashboard

features.name: Project Upload
features.description: Authenticated students can submit HTML/CSS project folders for review and evaluation.
user_flows: Navigate to /upload -> Select a project folder or files -> Submit the upload -> See the submission being processed and receive the evaluation result
Navigate to /upload -> Select project files that do not include the expected HTML/CSS content -> Submit the upload -> See validation feedback that the submission is not acceptable

features.name: Student Dashboard
features.description: Authenticated students can review their project overview, access submission-related information, and track their work history.
user_flows: Navigate to /student/dashboard -> View project overview and recent activity -> Select a recent submission -> Open its result details
Navigate to /student/dashboard -> View project overview -> Go to submission history -> Review past submission records

features.name: AI Evaluation Result
features.description: Students can inspect detailed AI feedback, scores, and recommendations for a submitted project.
user_flows: Navigate to /result -> View overall score and section scores -> Review detailed feedback -> Read improvement suggestions and learning recommendations
Navigate to /result -> View score breakdown -> Review feedback for HTML, CSS, and UI/UX -> Compare current performance with a previous attempt

features.name: Submission History
features.description: Students can browse their previous submissions and revisit earlier evaluation outcomes.
user_flows: Navigate to /submissions -> View submission history list -> Select a previous submission -> Open its result details
Navigate to /submissions -> View attempts over time -> Compare older and newer submission outcomes

features.name: Teacher Dashboard
features.description: Authenticated teachers can monitor classroom and student performance from a management dashboard.
user_flows: Navigate to /teacher/dashboard -> View classroom and student overview -> Select a class -> Review student performance metrics
Navigate to /teacher/dashboard -> View students sorted by performance -> Open a student summary -> Review their submission progress

features.name: Authentication
features.description: Login and registration for students and teachers
user_interactions: Click Register to go to registration

features.name: Project Upload
features.description: Students can upload folders with HTML/CSS files for review

features.name: Dashboard
features.description: Role-based dashboard for students and teachers
user_interactions: View overview of projects or classes
